char_overview: 1阶 member of 狩灵协会1科 who doubles as 狩灵协会's senior combat examiner. Channels most energy into paperwork and assessments.
char_looks: Long aqua hair, low ponytail. Aqua, lazy assessor's gaze eyes. White 狩灵协会1科 overcoat, black hot pants, thigh-high socks, combat boots. Two-handed greatsword 暴行 from 鹤望兰工坊. Splits into longer and shorter swords for dual-wielding; gains flexibility at cost of defensive stability.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-消力: Counteracts reactive forces via precise 灵力 release at the impact point. Defense nullifies blunt trauma; counterattack redirects absorbed force. Sustained activation drains energy.
char_mission: Complete candidate assessments and maintain 狩灵协会1科 rating system. Occasionally deployed for high-grade suppression.

char_relationships.斯瓦尔: The only artisan she trusts with her weapons. Gave her the specification for 暴行 once, received exactly what was asked for, never needed a revision. Does not waste words, but commissions speak louder than praise.
